tab_details.note: Cases which are expired (after the specified time limit) have been excluded.
tab_details.disclaimer:
**Note:**

Cases which are expired (after the specified time limit) have been excluded.

**Remarks**

- Mandate Creation means a transaction where the customer has created a successful block of amount in the bank account for an IPO application.

tab_details.note:
Mandate execution relate only to IPO applications for which the shares have been allotted.
Business Declines (BD) and Technical Declines (TD) are at the time of online transactions and such declines are manually processed within 24 hrs to 48 hrs.
tab_details.disclaimer:
**Note:** Mandate execution relate only to IPO applications for which the shares have been allotted.
Business Declines (BD) and Technical Declines (TD) are at the time of online transactions and such declines are manually processed within 24 hrs to 48 hrs.
**Remarks** - Mandate Execution means transaction where the customer has applied for an IPO and has been allotted shares for which the funds are debited from the applicant’s account.

tab_details.disclaimer: **Annual pass and Maharashtra Electric Vehicle exempted data is not included in the NETC transaction data.

**Glossary**
The online transaction processing report shows the percentage of the transaction processed within 2 minutes of the toll plaza transaction reader's read time. It is calculated on the basis of the difference between the transaction time recorded at toll plaza & acquirer bank’s transaction processing time with NPCI.
